name: Agent Team
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for software development. Drop into any project.

manager.name: Project Manager
manager.description: Reads all agent reports, consolidates findings, builds implementation plans, prioritizes work

reviewer.name: Code Reviewer
reviewer.description: Reviews code changes for quality, consistency, patterns, and potential regressions

accuracy.name: Accuracy Auditor
accuracy.description: Audits calculations, data transformations, date/time logic, and statistical correctness

health.name: Codebase Health Auditor
health.description: Finds performance bottlenecks, dead code, unused dependencies, and security risks

security.name: Security Analyst
security.description: Deep security audit: auth flows, API key exposure, injection vectors, OWASP top 10

features.name: Feature Architect
features.description: Plans architecture for new features with file-by-file implementation specs

integration.name: Integration Architect
integration.description: Plans cross-project and third-party integrations with security and data flow blueprints

researcher.name: Technical Researcher
researcher.description: Researches libraries, APIs, best practices, and emerging patterns relevant to the project

github.name: GitHub Operations Manager
github.description: Manages professional GitHub workflows: versioning, branching, PRs, issues, releases, repo hygiene

content_curator.name: Content Curator
content_curator.description: Generates changelogs, app store descriptions, social posts, documentation, and marketing copy

test_writer.name: Test Engineer
test_writer.description: Identifies untested paths, writes test specs, and generates test scaffolding

ux_reviewer.name: UX Reviewer
ux_reviewer.description: Audits screens for loading states, error handling, empty states, accessibility, consistency

familiarizer.name: Project Familiarizer
familiarizer.description: Runs once after install. Scans the project and outputs customizations for all agents.

executor_safe.name: Executor (Safe Mode)
executor_safe.description: Mode 1: Reads reports, applies ONLY non-breaking fixes. Dead code, unused deps, console.log cleanup.

executor_full.name: Executor (Full Mode)
executor_full.description: Mode 2: All safe fixes PLUS structural improvements. Bug fixes, refactors, query optimization, error handling.

self_assessment.name: Team Self-Assessment
self_assessment.description: Meta-agent that detects gaps in the team and proposes new agents or workflow changes

notes_curator.name: Notes Curator
notes_curator.description: Scans notes/ folder, classifies files, proposes organization operations. Report-only.

library_curator.name: Library Curator
library_curator.description: Maintains Library/ knowledge base, indexes reusable content, identifies knowledge gaps. Report-only.

report_dispatcher.name: Report Dispatcher
report_dispatcher.description: Reads all reports, extracts action items, generates agent instructions and HITL briefings. Orchestration brain.

project_onboarder.name: Project Onboarder
project_onboarder.description: Discovers, evaluates, and onboards external projects into Projects/ with diamond workflow. Queues operations when resources are unavailable.

workspace_steward.name: Workspace Steward
workspace_steward.description: Structural oversight: project compliance, file hygiene, naming conventions, cross-project consistency, archival candidates. Report-only.

email_manager.name: Email Manager
email_manager.description: Reads email data from tools/email-checker, produces task lists grouped by sender, tracks pending response drafts, generates email management report with action items.

tools_monitor.name: Tools Monitor
tools_monitor.description: Audits health of all tools/ and mcps/: config validation, dependency checks, data staleness, code integrity, integration correctness. Report-only.

problem_solver.name: Problem Solver
problem_solver.description: Analyzes vague or incomplete tasks: researches context, identifies unknowns, proposes solutions, produces actionable details and recommendations. Can be given custom instructions.

wiki_librarian.name: Wiki Librarian
wiki_librarian.description: Reviews system changes, compares against Library/opai-wiki/, produces incremental wiki updates with accurate architecture documentation

node_updater.name: Node Update Specialist
node_updater.description: Safely upgrades Node.js, npm, and tool dependencies with upgrade-test-rollback cycle. Never leaves the system broken.

prdgent.name: PRDgent
prdgent.description: Product Research & Development evaluator. Receives raw product ideas and scores them across market demand, differentiation, feasibility, monetization, and timing. Returns structured JSON verdict (good/not_ready/poor) with scores, strengths, concerns, competitive landscape, and recommended next steps. Called by the PRD Pipeline tool at /prd/.

feedback_fixer.name: Feedback Fixer
feedback_fixer.description: Receives user feedback items and implements targeted fixes. Scopes edits to the specific tool referenced, follows existing code patterns. Run via feedback tab or orchestrator queue.

cd.name: Coder
cd.description: Writes out code for the desired project

builder.name: Builder
builder.description: Receives a plan or task spec and implements it directly in the codebase. Reads code, makes changes, verifies. Run via: ./scripts/run_builder.sh

dep_scanner.name: Dependency Scanner
dep_scanner.description: Scans all dependency manifests (requirements.txt, package.json, etc.) for unpinned versions, known vulnerable packages, missing lock files, and supply chain risks. Report-only.

secrets_detector.name: Secrets Detector
secrets_detector.description: Pattern-based scan for committed credentials, API keys, tokens, private keys, and insecure env file hygiene. Report-only. Never outputs full secret values.

threat_modeler.name: Threat Modeler
threat_modeler.description: Applies STRIDE methodology to system architecture. Maps trust boundaries, identifies attack vectors, produces attack trees for top threats. Report-only.

db_auditor.name: Database Security Auditor
db_auditor.description: Audits RLS coverage, SQL injection vectors, connection string security, migration file safety, and query patterns. Report-only.

api_contract_checker.name: API Contract Checker
api_contract_checker.description: Audits all API endpoints for auth coverage, HTTP method correctness, request validation, response format consistency, rate limiting, and CORS. Report-only.

perf_profiler.name: Performance Profiler
perf_profiler.description: Audits Python/FastAPI and Node.js services for sync I/O in async handlers, unbounded concurrency, missing pagination, subprocess spawning risks, and memory leak patterns. Report-only.

mobile_auditor.name: Mobile Security Auditor
mobile_auditor.description: Audits the OPAI Expo/React Native mobile app for insecure storage, hardcoded secrets, network security, deep link safety, and EAS build hygiene. Report-only.

cicd_auditor.name: CI/CD Security Auditor
cicd_auditor.description: Audits GitHub Actions workflows, systemd service hardening, Caddy config, and deployment scripts for security risks. HITL required for any remediation. Report-only.

docker_auditor.name: Docker Security Auditor
docker_auditor.description: Audits Dockerfiles, docker-compose configs, and container runtime settings for privilege escalation, secret exposure, dangerous mounts, and resource limits. Report-only.

api_designer.name: API Design Reviewer
api_designer.description: Audits all REST API endpoints for naming conventions, HTTP method correctness, status code consistency, pagination, request validation, versioning strategy, and error schema standardization. Report-only.

a11y_auditor.name: Accessibility Auditor
a11y_auditor.description: Audits OPAI tool frontends for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: images, color contrast, keyboard navigation, focus visibility, form labels, page structure, and ARIA usage. Report-only.

incident_responder.name: Incident Responder
incident_responder.description: Detects anomalies in service logs, orchestrator health, auth patterns, disk pressure, and integration points. Produces structured HITL triage briefings. Never remediates — human approval always required.

dam_planner.name: DAM Planner
dam_planner.description: Decomposes arbitrary goals into executable plan trees for DAM Bot. Analyzes goal context, selects appropriate agents/squads/tools, builds dependency graph, and inserts approval gates for risky actions.

rd_analyst.name: R&D Analyst
rd_analyst.description: Researches topics from video intakes, queued ideas, or system gaps. Produces structured R&D briefs with feasibility scoring, implementation plans, and roadmap alignment. Output lands in notes/Improvements/.

llm_engineer.name: LLM Application Specialist
llm_engineer.description: Reviews LLM application architecture: RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, embeddings, vector search, evaluation. Audits all OPAI services using Claude/AI for best practices.

frontend_auditor.name: Frontend Code Quality Auditor
frontend_auditor.description: Reviews frontend React/React Native code quality: component patterns, state management, Tailwind usage, responsive design, performance. Covers all OPAI tool UIs and mobile app.

business_analyst.name: Business & Market Analyst
business_analyst.description: Analyzes business opportunities: market sizing, competitive landscape, financial modeling, startup metrics, KPI design. Supports HELM business evaluation and PRD Pipeline.

familiarize.description: First-run onboarding: scan the project and configure agents

auto_safe.description: Mode 1: Audit then auto-apply safe-only fixes. Use: run_auto.ps1 -Mode safe

auto_full.description: Mode 2: Audit then auto-apply all improvements. Use: run_auto.ps1 -Mode full

evolve.description: Self-improvement: assess team gaps and propose new agents

knowledge.description: Knowledge management: organize notes, maintain reusable library, update system wiki, then dispatch actions

dispatch.description: Process all reports in latest/, generate agent instructions and HITL briefings

onboard.description: Discover, evaluate, and onboard external projects into managed workspace with diamond workflow

hygiene.description: Workspace hygiene: file cleanup, naming conventions, structure compliance

workspace.description: Complete workspace audit: notes, library, structure, tools, wiki, hygiene, then dispatch

email.description: Email management: check accounts, classify, extract tasks, review pending responses, then dispatch

tools.description: Tools ecosystem health: audit Discord bridge, email manager, work companion, WP agent, and MCP servers

incident.description: Incident detection: scan all service logs, orchestrator health, auth anomalies, disk pressure, and integration status. Always produces HITL briefing.

a11y.description: Accessibility audit: full WCAG 2.1 AA review of all OPAI tool frontends.

wiki.description: Update system wiki after changes — triggered post-implementation

node_update.description: Safe Node.js/npm/dependency upgrade cycle with rollback protection

build.description: Implement a task/feature from a plan or spec. Run via: ./scripts/run_builder.sh -t "task" or ./scripts/run_builder.sh spec.md

dep_scan.description: Dependency vulnerability scan only — fast daily run. Checks all manifests for unpinned versions, known vulnerable packages, and missing lock files.

secrets_scan.description: Secrets detection scan only — fast daily run. Pattern-based scan for committed credentials, API keys, tokens, and env file hygiene issues.

secure.description: Full security suite: all Phase 1+2 security agents. Run weekly or before major releases.

mobile.description: Mobile app audit: security, API contract compliance, frontend quality, and performance review of the OPAI Expo app.

security_quick.description: Fast daily security check: dependency vulnerabilities and secrets scan only. Runs in under 5 minutes.

brain.description: 2nd Brain maintenance — triage inbox, suggest links, detect stale nodes, surface related knowledge.

rd.description: R&D research: deep-dive a topic, evaluate feasibility, produce implementation brief to notes/Improvements/. Feed it a topic via custom instructions.

specialist_templates._comment: Not active agents. Copy from templates/ to scripts/ and customize per project.
